testcase.name: testCreateConversationUnauthenticated
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow.

testcase.name: testCreateConversationWrongContentTypeReturns415
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED

testcase.name: testCreateConversationMissingTitleReturns400
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED

testcase.name: testCreateConversationPayloadTooLargeReturns413
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED

testcase.name: testCreateConversationRateLimitReturns429
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED

testcase.name: testCreateConversationInvalidUserStateReturns400
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean99" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 6 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: false LastName valid: true FAIL: FirstName contains invalid characters FAIL: FirstName contains numbers validateUserState FAILED: invalid_chars, contains_numbers

testcase.name: testCreateConversationSuccessReturns201
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED

testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateValid
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateInvalidFirstName
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean99" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 6 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: false LastName valid: true FAIL: FirstName contains invalid characters FAIL: FirstName contains numbers validateUserState FAILED: invalid_chars, contains_numbers

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateInvalidLastName
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont<>" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 8 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: false validateUserState FAILED:

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateInvalidEmail
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: bad-email FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: false Email error: Invalid email format

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateEmailTakenByOtherUser
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: false Email error: Email already in use by another account

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateInvalidDates
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true Dates valid: false Date error: maxDate date must be after minDate date

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateFirstNameTooShortCoversLengthBranch
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "J" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 1 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: false LastName valid: true FAIL: FirstName length=1 (min=2, max=20) validateUserState FAILED: length

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateFirstNameStartsWithHyphenCoversStartEndBranch
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "-Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 5 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: false LastName valid: true FAIL: FirstName starts/ends with invalid char validateUserState FAILED: start_end_invalid

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateFirstNameWithDangerousCharCoversDangerousBranch
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean<Luc" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 8 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: false LastName valid: true FAIL: FirstName contains invalid characters FAIL: FirstName contains dangerous char: < validateUserState FAILED: invalid_chars, dangerous_char_<

testcase.name: testValidateUserStateFirstNameThreeConsecutiveCharsCoversConsecutiveBranch
testcase.system-out: === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean---Luc" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 10 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: false LastName valid: true FAIL: FirstName has too many consecutive special chars validateUserState FAILED: too_many_consecutive

testcase.name: testCreateConversationWithDescriptionFieldIs201
testcase.system-out: >>> DIAG: createConversation STARTED >>> DIAG: $papertrailLogger exists, attempting to log... >>> DIAG: Log method call completed (no exception thrown) >>> DIAG: Test finished, continuing normal flow. === VALIDATE USER STATE START === User ID: 1 Email: jean.dupont@example.com FirstName: "Jean" LastName: "Dupont" FirstName length: 4 LastName length: 6 FirstName valid: true LastName valid: true Email valid: true validateUserState PASSED
